name: AzureAISearchClient_vector_keyword_search_odata_filter_safety
description: Security test to ensure AzureAISearchClient.vector_keyword_search constructs an OData filter only for safe titles and ignores titles containing quotes (to mitigate OData injection). Uses a fake search_client_factory to capture search kwargs.
input: Instantiate AzureAISearchClient with: search_client_factory returning a fake object with a search(**kwargs) that records kwargs and yields no results; openai_client_factory returning a fake async client whose embeddings.create returns an object with data[0].embedding = [0.1,0.2]. Call vector_keyword_search(system_prompt=SYSTEM_PROMPT, top_k=3, selected_titles=['Safe Title','Unsafe "quote"','Also Safe']).
output: The fake search object's recorded kwargs include 'filter' that contains only safe titles (Safe Title and Also Safe) and excludes the unsafe title containing quotes; the method returns an empty list of context chunks.
success_criteria: the fake search method was invoked once with kwargs
kwargs['filter'] string exists and contains "title eq 'Safe Title'" and "title eq 'Also Safe'"
kwargs['filter'] does not contain the unsafe title containing quotes
returned value is a list (empty in this stubbed case)
error_scenarios: openai_client_factory raises during embedding creation (should be logged and re-raised)
search_client_factory raises at init (function raises ValueError per get_search_client behavior)
fake search object not called due to earlier exception
